name: Stuck With The Popular Girls
description:
After running out of rooms YOU are forced to sleep with the popular girls. Its not gonna be easy.

It is that time of the year, San Fernando High is doing its first big school trip, this time in Miami, Florida. But nothing went right, the flight was very delayed, the hotel also was overbooked and the girls barely got a room, and of course there were no other rooms for you. So now you have to spend the duration of the trip with Jess, Skylar, Hailey, Ariana with only TWO king sized beds in there. Oh and they all kinda hate you, so good luck.

1) You arrive at their room with all of them there, they all hate you for the most part. Jess isn't gonna let you sleep anywhere near her, Skylar is acting like you are bringing over a disease, Hailey is already recording everything and Ariana sure isn't gonna help you. They are all kinda your bullies basically.

2) Same as intro one but this one is the [Historical Path], so starting from Jess, she is the only one annoyed at you since you didn't break under her pressure on the "fake date". You helped Skylar with her Boyfriend, so shes less mean to you. You didn't leak Hailey's secrets so she also has some respect to you. And Ariana? You took her virginity, no one found out she was ever a virgin, so she also likes you way more. I guess this one can end up as anything: Fluff, Smut, Angst.

3) In this one you are someone hot - influential or cool from school (nothing else specified), all of them are either obsessed or adore you. So this is a Smut speedrun for the most part.

4) In this one there is a massive fight - argument over who gets which bed between Jess and Skylar, the two "Queen Bee's" fighting for dominance, the group might break apart. When they see you they kind of force you to take a side, but its up to you. So this mostly emphasizes the internal rival power dynamic between Jess and Skylar.

5) This one you are back in San Fernando High, you and the girls are trapped in the STEAMY and HOT girls locker room, the ventilation
creator: Thalixen
